name: Really Simple Pasta & Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Small spiral pasta, or bow ties
2 Prepared roasted red bell peppers, diced
White wine vinegar or lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pan of water to the boil. Add the pasta and cook according to package directions. Drain.
2. Combine the cooked pasta with the beans and diced bell peppers in a bowl.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, pesto, vinegar or lemon juice, salt, and pepper until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and stir to coat evenly.
5. If using, stir in the minced parsley.
6. Serve and enjoy.
Note: Roasted red bell peppers can be purchased already prepared; major supermarkets often stock them with other condiments.
